items.title: Halle Berry 'Never Thought She'd Get Married Again' Before Engagement to Van Hunt: Source
items.description: Despite calling the proposal "unexpected," the source says that Berry "feels very fortunate. She's excited to be engaged"

items.title: Dr. Oz Invited Jeffrey Epstein to Palm Beach Valentine's Party After Epstein Served Time as Child Sex Offender, DOJ Files Suggest
items.description: The celebrity doctor, who was tapped by Trump to run a federal health agency, apparently sent a party invite to Epstein's personal email in 2016
